PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.py$'; then cd backend && ruff format $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>/dev/null; fi
PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files with ruff after edit/write

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE 'backend/supabase/migrations/0.*\.sql$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not modify existing migration files — create a new migration instead' && exit 1; fi
PreToolUse.description: Block writes to existing migration files

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '^\.env'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not modify .env files — use .env.example instead' && exit 1; fi

Stop.description: Run backend test suite before stopping
